title: Slovakian Ricotta Crepes
description: Delight in these thin Slovakian-inspired crepes filled with a creamy ricotta mixture, perfect for a light dessert or snack.

ingredients.name: radiant
ingredients.notes: Add a touch of radiant's sweetness to balance out the ricotta

ingredients.name: slovakian
ingredients.notes: A pinch of traditional Slovakian spice adds depth to the filling

ingredients.name: sugar
ingredients.notes: Granulated sugar to balance out the flavors

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the ricotta, radiant, slovakian, and sugar until smooth.
Heat a small non-stick pan over medium heat.
Brush the pan with a small amount of oil to prevent sticking.
Pour in a small amount of batter and tilt the pan to evenly coat the bottom.
Cook for 1-2 minutes, until the edges start to curl and the surface is dry.
Loosen the crepe with a spatula and flip it over.
Cook for an additional 30 seconds to 1 minute, until the other side is lightly browned.
Repeat with the remaining batter, until all the crepes are cooked.
